title: サクラバクシンオー登場！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Bakushin O, an Umamusume who is
basically the concept of class representative
incarnate. With a burning passion to become an
exemplary figure to all, she sets off to challenge
the Twinkle Series!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To become a leading example for her classmates,
her mission is to win every single G1 race.
However, running in every single race won't be
realistic.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After reproaching her some, Sakura Bakushin O
changes her gears towards a common path for
many Umamusume, the Classics. Eyes set on the
"Bakushin Road," she runs full steam ahead!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite her talent for sprinting, Sakura Bakushin
O wants to follow a different path. It'll be tough
for me to figure out how to best make use of her
skills.
